name: Otel
description: OpenTelemetry-themed engineering pet fixture for Frankenstein doctor.

abilities.name: Good Laziness
abilities.badForm: Avoids the work and creates debt for later.
abilities.goodForm: Hates repeated work enough to automate it, simplify it, document it, or replace it with a better library.
abilities.rule: Reduce total effort, not just your effort right now.
abilities.workflowEffect: Suggests scripts, generators, reusable commands, and deletion of repeated manual steps.
